channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Tue May 12: Focus on LLM Infrastructure and AI Agent Frameworks
item.description: Today's research highlights a strong emphasis on developing infrastructure for large language models (LLMs) and frameworks for AI agents. Projects like 'mlflow' and 'openai-agents-python' showcase advancements in orchestrating AI workflows and optimizing model performance.
